top_signals.title: Nearly 80% of data center capacity is at elevated risk to climate hazards like flooding and fire, study says
top_signals.summary: The vast majority of data centers globally face either acute risk from climate change events or chronic risk from ongoing climate issues like extreme heat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: As Europe rearms, ‘wingman’ aircraft take center stage
top_signals.summary: European and U.S. defense forces are rapidly developing their own AI-powered drones to complement their fighter jets and carry extra battlefield tech.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CISA orders feds to patch max severity Joomla plugin flaw by Friday
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to patch a maximum-severity flaw in the Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor (JCE) plugin that is being actively exploited in the wild. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Microsoft fixes Windows Server 2016 security update failures
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has fixed a known issue causing the June 2026 security updates to fail on Windows Server 2016 systems that weren't up to date. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
